chemotherapy drug claim with a corresponding Part B claim for cancer on the date of, or in the 59 
days preceding, the drug claim. Episodes continued for six months after the triggering chemotherapy 
event, as long as the beneficiary met eligibility requirements for all six months. Beneficiaries who 
continued to receive chemotherapy after completing the six-month episode initiated a new episode.
